CustomField.formula: CASE( Status_frm__c , "New",IMAGE("/resource/1712610540000/YellowButtonPNG?", "New",30,30), "Pending",IMAGE("/resource/1712610540000/YellowButtonPNG?", "Pending",30,30), "Ready for Signature", IMAGE("/resource/1712610566000/GreenButtonPNG?", "Ready for Signature",30,30), "Rejected", IMAGE("/resource/1712610507000/RedButtonPNG?", "Rejected",30,30), IMAGE("/resource/1712610585000/BlueButtonPNG?", "Draft",30,30))
CustomField.label: Internal Approval Status Indicator
